name: claudeline (Luca Silverentand)
description: Claude Code statusline shipped as the npm package `claudeline` with built-in themes; can self-install into settings.json via its `--install` flag.
description_fr: Statusline Claude Code fournie sous le paquet npm `claudeline` avec des thèmes intégrés ; peut s'auto-installer dans settings.json via son option `--install`.
description_ja: npm パッケージ `claudeline` として配布され、組み込みテーマと `--install` フラグによる settings.json への自動インストールに対応した Claude Code statusline。

image.alt: claudeline statusline — model, token count, rate-limit bars

notes: Distinct from fredrikaverpil/claudeline (Go binary) despite the shared name. The package's `--install` flag patches settings.json automatically; the configs.claude here is the same snippet that flag would write.
